title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS, an open-source system that transforms an Obsidian vault of 10,000+ notes into actionable context for AI agents. The system uses a three-layer architecture (raw content, index, wiki) with deep research algorithms to index personal documents and web sources, then stores findings as memory that agents can query and maintain.
writeup: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard demonstrate an open-source AI Research OS that converts an Obsidian vault of more than 10,000 notes into queryable context for AI agents. The system runs on a three-layer architecture (raw content, index, and wiki) and applies deep research algorithms to index both personal documents and web sources. Findings are stored as memory that agents can query and maintain over time. The build illustrates context and memory management for agents grounded in a large personal knowledge base.
